CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2013 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-24-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ROBERT CHU's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is off calendar per the request of the moving party. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2013 Continued To Mar-13-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2012 Continued To Jan-16-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-02-2012 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ED RODZEWICH, ESQ., STRATMAN & PATTERSON, 510.457.3440, FOR DEFENDANT BUTTERFLY RESTAURANT; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS BUTTERFLY RESTAURANT and ROBERT LAM'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with 20 days leave to amend. Plaintiff has leave to plead more facts to support the violation of civil rights cause of action. Order signed in open Court. Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Edward J. Rodzewich, Esq. of Stratman Patterson & Hunter, Tel. 415.509.4425, for Defendants and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted the tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS BUTTERFLY RESTAURANT and ROBERT LAM's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained with ten days leave to amend. The court did not receive courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Order signed in open Court. Judge: James J. McBride; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Aug-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Counsel for PLAINTIFF ROBERT CHU'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is OFF CALENDAR PER MR. HALE. Judge: James J. McBride; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
